name: chart-radar-radius
visual_summary: Radar Radius Chart is a reusable UI component that displays radar chart data with customizable radius for highlighting key performance indicators. It is typically used to visualize complex data sets in a compact and engaging way. This component is ideal for presenting data in a non-traditional and interactive manner, making it a great choice for data-driven applications.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Description: Radar Radius Chart is a reusable UI component that displays radar chart data with customizable radius for highlighting key performance indicators. It is typically used to visualize complex data sets in a compact and engaging way. Style: Dark Mode, Minimalist Design, HighContrast

Tags: Data Visualization, Radar Chart, Performance Metrics

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
